question: What is the risk difference for the combined outcome in the estrogen trial alluded to earlier? We established 5.2-year risks of $\hat{p}_1=0.08829$ in the treatment group and $\hat{p}_2=0.07689$ in the control group.
answer: $\hat{p}_1-\hat{p}_2=0.08829-0.07689=0.0114$. This is equivalent to 11.4 additional cases per 1000 exposed individuals over the 5.2 -year period.
